_meta.notes: Form-agnostic five-beat arc for the Forsaken Village. The villagers fled mid-everything; the player, in whatever form, has to figure out WHY before the thing that drove them out comes back. The chapel altar holds the first clue. Win: clue_count>=3 AND turn>=5. Designed to work for slime / book / egg / core / generic-creature without form-specific phrasing — beats describe events, not actions, so the narrator reframes them per form. v2 (2026-05-05): suggestedVerbs added as per-form records (Phase 11 P11+). Slime/book/egg/core get hand-authored 3-button menus per beat; generic-creature falls through to its own iconicVerbs (examine/sense/act).

beats.narrative: Nothing has happened for a half-day, and that is itself the wrongest thing about this place. There were people here this morning. There aren't now. Whatever called them away did not stop to be polite about it.

lesser-slime.label: feel the absence
lesser-slime.description: no footsteps; no breath; only stone holding its own weight

lesser-slime.label: ooze into the silence
lesser-slime.description: let your forward edge thin and pour across the empty floor

lesser-slime.label: absorb the vacated air
lesser-slime.description: the chemistry of recent leaving — sweat, hearth-smoke, fear

cursed-book.label: fall open to absence
cursed-book.description: let the page settle on whatever the wind chooses; it is the silence's page

cursed-book.label: flutter into the still air
cursed-book.description: the only motion in the room is yours; let the silence notice

cursed-book.label: decode the absence
cursed-book.description: the silence has a shape; read it as cipher

dragon-egg.label: listen to the empty village
dragon-egg.description: the world arrives as the rhythm of nothing

dragon-egg.label: hum into the silence
dragon-egg.description: a note in the empty room; let it return to you unanswered

dragon-egg.label: find a hearth still warm
dragon-egg.description: warmth lingers somewhere; locate it through your shell

dungeon-core.label: search the stone
dungeon-core.description: the dungeon's stone reports back: no one is here, but someone was

dungeon-core.label: claim what was left
dungeon-core.description: the village's silence becomes your dungeon's antechamber

dungeon-core.label: settle into the silence
dungeon-core.description: more dungeon than there was a moment ago

beats.narrative: On the altar, something that should not be on an altar. It is still wet. Whatever was placed here was placed recently, and it is the most recent honest thing in this village.

lesser-slime.label: taste the offering
lesser-slime.description: fold the wet thing into your essence — it will tell you what it is

lesser-slime.label: feel the altar's weight
lesser-slime.description: the placement was recent; the stone still remembers the hand

lesser-slime.label: ooze across the altar
lesser-slime.description: let your edge cross the offering and read it through contact

cursed-book.label: read the offering
cursed-book.description: the wet thing is a sentence; the altar its punctuation

cursed-book.label: take a word from the wood
cursed-book.description: the altar holds a syllable spoken into it; pull it into your margins

cursed-book.label: note the placement
cursed-book.description: a marginal mark; a record that you witnessed

dragon-egg.label: listen for the placer
dragon-egg.description: they are not far; their breath still presses the chapel air

dragon-egg.label: absorb the offering's warmth
dragon-egg.description: still warm; whoever brought it left only minutes ago

dragon-egg.label: dream past the placer
dragon-egg.description: they came from the west; show yourself their road

dungeon-core.label: track the placer
dungeon-core.description: their weight pressed the altar stone; follow the impression

dungeon-core.label: preserve the altar's pretense
dungeon-core.description: let later visitors see what was meant to be seen

dungeon-core.label: claim the chapel
dungeon-core.description: the altar is a fixture in your dungeon now

fires.detail: altar offering, fresh; one clue gathered

beats.narrative: On three tables in the tavern, coins. The patrons did not pay as they left — not because they could not, but because paying was not what their minds were doing. They are running.

lesser-slime.label: absorb the unfinished cups
lesser-slime.description: taste the residue — fear thickened the ale before they left it

lesser-slime.label: feel the chairs
lesser-slime.description: the wood still holds the shape of a body that stood up too fast

lesser-slime.label: ooze across the abandoned tables
lesser-slime.description: let your edge cross every coin and mug; learn the exodus by contact

cursed-book.label: read the coins as a sentence
cursed-book.description: their layout is a story — three tables, all unpaid, the same direction of flight

cursed-book.label: take a word from a stained note
cursed-book.description: a name half-rendered on a beer-soaked ledger page

cursed-book.label: mark the open ledger
cursed-book.description: weep onto the open page; record that you witnessed the flight

dragon-egg.label: listen to the leaving
dragon-egg.description: the tavern still holds the rhythm of chairs scraped back at once

dragon-egg.label: warm the cooling cups
dragon-egg.description: let your glow find what their hands left; the room remembers them

dragon-egg.label: find the last warm cup
dragon-egg.description: the heat will tell you how recently they were here

dungeon-core.label: track them out the door
dungeon-core.description: their boot-prints in the sawdust point west; follow with the stone

dungeon-core.label: set the tavern as a trap
dungeon-core.description: make it look untouched; whoever returns will not expect a watching

dungeon-core.label: draw warmth from the residue
dungeon-core.description: they left heat in every chair; take it back into the dungeon's stone

fires.detail: pattern of unpaid drinks; one clue gathered

beats.narrative: Hoofprints in the dust on the western road, all going one way. Everyone — every one — went west. The road's other direction is empty in the way roads do not usually choose to be.

lesser-slime.label: feel the road's vibration
lesser-slime.description: the western road still hums with their leaving; the eastern road is silent

lesser-slime.label: ooze along the prints
lesser-slime.description: let your forward edge follow the hoof-marks west, slowly

lesser-slime.label: absorb the road's dust
lesser-slime.description: what they kicked up is still settling; learn the column's chemistry

cursed-book.label: read the prints as a passage
cursed-book.description: the road is a sentence written in a single direction

cursed-book.label: flutter in the western wind
cursed-book.description: let the wind from the west turn your pages; learn what it carries

cursed-book.label: let an older hand write the road
cursed-book.description: an inscription appears in your pages — the road's history, in older script

dragon-egg.label: listen to the road carry breath
dragon-egg.description: the western wind carries voices; not yours, but kin to something

dragon-egg.label: dream past the village edge
dragon-egg.description: past the road's bend, past the cliff, toward what called them

dragon-egg.label: pulse warmth toward the west
dragon-egg.description: if a kindred thing went that way, your warmth may reach it

dungeon-core.label: track them through stone
dungeon-core.description: the road's bedrock remembers every hoof; let it report back

dungeon-core.label: show the road's wrong fork
dungeon-core.description: if anyone returns, let them take the path you choose

dungeon-core.label: send something west
dungeon-core.description: tether a will to a creature in the dust; learn what they fled to

fires.detail: all tracks west; one clue gathered

beats.narrative: Three pieces are enough. The villagers were not driven from the village by something that came in. They were called from it by something that asked. The asking happened from the west.

lesser-slime.label: ooze toward the asking
lesser-slime.description: let your forward edge thin and pour west — the call is still resonating

lesser-slime.label: feel the asking in the stone
lesser-slime.description: the call still hums in the bedrock; locate its source

lesser-slime.label: absorb the residue of the call
lesser-slime.description: fold the asking's chemistry into your essence — learn its shape

cursed-book.label: decode the asking
cursed-book.description: the call has a grammar; render it on your pages

cursed-book.label: let the older hand surface
cursed-book.description: an inscription writes itself — the asking's true name, in older script

cursed-book.label: record the asking
cursed-book.description: weep the call onto your lectern; preserve what was asked

dragon-egg.label: dream toward the asker
dragon-egg.description: past the western road, past whatever cliff — find the one who called

dragon-egg.label: answer the asking
dragon-egg.description: ring your shell with a note older than the call; let the asker hear

dragon-egg.label: absorb the call's warmth
dragon-egg.description: the asking carried heat; take what reaches you through the cold

dungeon-core.label: signal westward
dungeon-core.description: send a low pulse through the stone; the older predator above also notices

dungeon-core.label: claim the village as outer ring
dungeon-core.description: the abandoned village becomes the outermost chamber of your dungeon

dungeon-core.label: send a binding west
dungeon-core.description: tether a will to a creature heading toward the asker; learn through it
